name: html-allowlist
description: HTML sanitizer with an explicit allowlist rule language
author: Pedro Laguna <plaguna@users.noreply.github.com>

scripts.fuzz: npm run build && mkdir -p fuzz/generated/sanitize && jazzer fuzz/sanitize.fuzz.js fuzz/generated/sanitize fuzz/corpus/sanitize -- -dict=fuzz/sanitize.dict -max_len=4096 -rss_limit_mb=4096
scripts.fuzz:rules: npm run build && mkdir -p fuzz/generated/compile-rules && jazzer fuzz/compile-rules.fuzz.js fuzz/generated/compile-rules fuzz/corpus/compile-rules --sync -- -max_len=1024
scripts.fuzz:smoke: npm run build && mkdir -p fuzz/generated/sanitize fuzz/generated/compile-rules && jazzer fuzz/sanitize.fuzz.js fuzz/generated/sanitize fuzz/corpus/sanitize -- -dict=fuzz/sanitize.dict -max_len=4096 -rss_limit_mb=4096 -max_total_time=60 && jazzer fuzz/compile-rules.fuzz.js fuzz/generated/compile-rules fuzz/corpus/compile-rules --sync -- -max_len=1024 -max_total_time=30
